response:
<<The Rise of Vitaly>>

Vitaly became the boss of sales,  
He sold more than any other,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He bought a cool car, fast and sleek,  
His life was full of dreams and hope,  
Drunk.  

* * *  

He drank too much, lost control,  
His body felt the pain and strain,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He missed the committee meeting,  
His work was not as good as before,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He tried to fix his mistakes,  
But alcohol made things worse,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He needed to change his ways,  
To focus on his goals and dreams,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He learned from his past,  
To live a better life with care,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He started to sell again,  
With new energy and focus,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He made a new plan,  
To grow and reach his goals,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He worked hard every day,  
To prove he was the best,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He met new people,  
Shared his story with them,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He inspired others,  
To chase their dreams with passion,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He read a book,  
To learn from others' experiences,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He talked to his team,  
To build a better future,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He took a trip,  
To find new ideas and inspiration,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He played baseball,  
To stay fit and healthy,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He joined the committee,  
To help others succeed,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He focused on his body,  
To stay strong and healthy,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He avoided alcohol,  
To live a better life,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He kept his goals in mind,  
To be the best he could be,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He made a new start,  
With a fresh and clean mind,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He became a role model,  
For others to follow,  
Drunk.  

* * *

He lived his dream,  
With purpose and passion,  
Drunk.
